args: d=$PWD; while [ "$d" != / ] && [ ! -f "$d/scripts/playwright-mcp.sh" ]; do d=$(dirname "$d"); done; [ -f "$d/scripts/playwright-mcp.sh" ] || { echo "playwright-mcp.sh not found above $PWD" >&2; exit 1; }; exec bash "$d/scripts/playwright-mcp.sh" "$@"
